findings.description: The vendor information table contains duplicated content and incorrect structure.
findings.evidence: In the HTML vendor table, the 'FEDERAL ID' is duplicated in column 3, 'Where will services be performed:' is repeated across all three columns, and the fax number is duplicated in columns 2 and 3.

findings.description: A signature image is missing and an incorrect image snippet is inserted in its place.
findings.evidence: The handwritten signature in the 'AUTHORIZED SIGNATURE' cell is missing in the HTML. Instead, an image containing a cropped snippet of the 'ACCEPTANCE OF QUOTE' section is incorrectly placed in that cell.

findings.description: Table cells were duplicated in the first page's vendor execution form to force a uniform 3-column grid structure.
findings.evidence: In the HTML table for vendor information, the cells for 'FEDERAL ID OR SOCIAL SECURITY NO.', 'Where will services be performed', and 'FAX NUMBER' are repeated in both Column 2 and Column 3. The source PDF only has these fields once, spanning the available space.
